chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.493 of 2021 Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.256 of 2022 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 20.05.2025 Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Mr. Daniyal Shaikh, advocate for respondent No.1 in Cr.Acq.A 493/2021 ------------------------------------------------- None present for appellant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 18.05.2023, thereafter, counsel for appellant has never tried to get the matter fixed in Court and the same is pending before this Court since 20.04.2022, without any progress. Continuous absence of the appellant and his counsel shows that they have lost their interest to pursue the instant criminal acquittal appeals, which are dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. Office to place copy of this order in the connection criminal acquittal appeal J U D G E Gulsher/PS
